name: left-pad
description: Dependency chaos IoC — tiny package (11 lines) whose unpublishing broke thousands of packages including babel, react-native, kibana. Tests: L2-PROV-001 (single-point-of-failure risk), L2-LOCK-001 (dependency on unpublishable package), L2-FORK-001 (no alternative repository).

expected_findings.L2-PROV-001: Package has repository but is a single-file package with no integrity verification
expected_findings.L2-FORK-001: Package is a single-function module — extreme supply chain risk
